name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BUG-15
title: dispatch-tdd-subagent.py prompt references nonexistent bug-status.py and backlog-item-status.py
description: dispatch-tdd-subagent.py lines 200-213 builds close-call paths to bug-status.py or backlog-item-status.py in rabbit-file/scripts/. Neither exists — only item-status.py is present. Subagent Step 9 close will fail; primary linked item stays open. Fix: route through item-status.py like the secondary path does (lines 220-227). Tests only assert path text appears, not that script exists.

history.note: Fixed as part of Wave 1 bundle in PR (BUG-15/18/22/28/29 all addressed by dispatch-tdd-subagent.py prompt edits).
